title: Networth Securities and Finance Limited Appoints Titus Oyafemi as New MD/CEO - FinancialEDGE
description: The board of directors of Networth Securities and Finance Limited has announced the appointment of Titus Oyafemi as its new Managing Director and Chief Executive Officer. Oyafemi, a graduate of Mathematics from the University of Ibadan, brings over a decade of experience in the financial sector to his new role. Before assuming his current position,
html: The board of directors of Networth Securities and Finance Limited has announced the appointment of Titus Oyafemi as its new Managing Director and Chief Executive Officer.
